gaps.snippet: # [doc = " The **outcome of handling** an [`Outcome`] under a recovery policy (RFC-0014 §4.2)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " There is **no `Dropped` variant** (I1): a mutant handler that discarded an unmatched error"] # [doc = " cannot be expressed using this type."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " - [`Resolution::Recovered`]: the error was replaced by a concrete value, tagged honestly"] # [doc = "   (never upgraded — I2/VR-5)."] # [doc = " - [`Resolution::Propagated`]: the error continues to surface (possibly transformed); it was"] # [doc = "   never discarded."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " Both variants carry the [`PolicyRef`] of the acting policy (if any) so every outcome is"] # [doc = " EXPLAIN-able (C3)."] # [derive (Debug , Clone , PartialEq)] pub enum Resolution < T , E > { # [doc = " The error was explicitly recovered: a concrete value with an honest, policy-inherited tag."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " # Guarantee tag (I2/VR-5)"] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " `tag` is **never upgraded** by the policy: it is at most the action's honest ceiling"] # [doc = " (`Declared` for a `Fallback`; the attempt's own tag for a `Retry`; `Exact` for a clean"] # [doc = " `Ok` pass-through).  The `meet` of the action ceiling and the policy's declared tag is"] # [doc = " taken to ensure the tag never rises (FR-R3)."] Recovered { # [doc = " The recovered value."] value : T , # [doc = " The honest guarantee tag (meet of the action's ceiling and the policy's tag; ≤ policy"] # [doc = " tag; never `Exact` unless the recovered value provably justifies it — I2/VR-5)."] tag : GuaranteeStrength , # [doc = " The content-addressed policy that recovered this value (C3 / EXPLAIN-able)."] policy : Option < PolicyRef > , } , # [doc = " The error was re-propagated — it never vanished (I1)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " The error may have been transformed (e.g. class-escalated) but it continues to surface."] # [doc = " A budget overrun for a `CleanupThenPropagate` cleanup effect is recorded in"] # [doc = " `cleanup_overrun` rather than swallowed (spec §7-Q4 disposition: record it for legibility)."] Propagated { # [doc = " The propagating error (possibly transformed/escalated)."] error : E , # [doc = " The content-addressed policy that acted, if any (C3 / EXPLAIN-able)."] policy : Option < PolicyRef > , # [doc = " Whether a `cleanup_then_propagate` cleanup effect overran its budget (spec §7-Q4)."] # [doc = ""] # [doc = " `true` means the cleanup was **skipped** because of an `EffectBudgetExhausted`; the"] # [doc = " original error propagates regardless.  `false` means either no cleanup was attempted"] # [doc = " or the cleanup ran successfully within its budget."] cleanup_overrun : bool , } , }
